variants.title: FilterFinder FF300391C Compressed Air Filter | Replaces the Hi-Line HE36-5
variants.description: The FF300391C is our FilterFinder Approved replacement compressed air filter. Our element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of original equipment manufacturers, ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with our polyester needle felt media and a durable design, the FF300391C provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. With FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
